mapper.select: SELECT code AS "value", code_name AS "label", sort_order FROM tb_code WHERE grp_code = #{grp_code} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY sort_order, code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_log (log_type, pgm_id, user_id, user_ip, log_dt) VALUES (#{log_type}, #{pgm_id}, #{user_id}, #{user_ip}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT dept_code, parent_code FROM tb_dept WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_file (file_id, ref_type, ref_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type, sort_order, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{file_id}, #{ref_type}, #{ref_id}, #{file_name}, #{file_path}, #{file_size}, #{content_type}, #{sort_order}, #{user_id}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT file_id, ref_type, ref_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, content_type, sort_order, created_by, created_at FROM tb_file WHERE ref_type = #{ref_type} AND ref_id = #{ref_id} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_audit_log (trace_id, pgm_id, table_name, action, row_key, before_data, after_data, user_id, user_ip, audit_dt) VALUES (#{trace_id}, #{pgm_id}, #{table_name}, #{action}, #{row_key}, #{before_data}, #{after_data}, #{user_id}, #{user_ip}, NOW())
